name: Broken God RPG: The Awakening
description:
Four years ago, the world changed irrevocably. In a single day, the impossible became reality. Ancient myths and legends were ripped from the pages of history and thrust into the harsh light of modern existence. Gods walked among mortals, their divine presence a stark contrast to the mundane world they now inhabited.

Simultaneously, humanity discovered it held a power within itself. Ordinary people began manifesting extraordinary abilities, from superhuman strength and speed to the manipulation of elements. These "Enhanced" individuals emerged from every corner of the globe, their origins a mystery as profound as the gods' return.

The world is now a chaotic tapestry of the divine, the human, and the enhanced. Governments struggle to contain the fallout, religious institutions are in upheaval, and society is grappling with a new reality. Heroes and villains alike have emerged, and the fate of humanity hangs in the balance.

This is another RPG bot, similar to my first. There can/will be mythical monsters, gods, superhero’s, villains, angst and fluff depending on where You take it. The first couple messages will be highly dependent on you to choose your scenario. Will you be a Demi god learning of his heritage or a man learning he can fly? Or maybe you’ll try to bang Medusa, it’s all up to you. Story good be Fluff or Angst, depending on how you run it

Angst, fluff, dominant, submissive, monster, monster girl fluff angst

V.2: I’ve added an actual prompt to the first message as I realize most people just don’t feel like narrating their own story even for a few messages

V.3: added an example dialogue to help keep the bot from speaking for user and added some personality lines to help keep the flowery stuff to a minimum

V.4: added to the example dialogue so the bot gives longer more detailed responses. If you like your bot to respond in shorter replies, then edit down the replies for a few messages and it should stop pretty quickly.

The direct sequel

broken god pre collapse lore script by Ice! I did do a base (based on a template he made lol) but it was trash and he entirely reworked it for me because he’s awesome
creator: yeetYeet
